questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Thank you very much for helping me my bicycle yesterday. You really gave a hand.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: My parents and I often to clean up the beach with neighbors on weekends. We feel happy that we can do something for the Earth.
questions.explanation: 世界經濟學家能預測下次的金融危機嗎? Will the world’s economists be able to __________ the next financial __________? 選擇建功‧ 13 ‧尊榮一生 【詳解】 predict; crisis II. 句子重組(第 3 題 4 分) 說明: ▲請將題中 6 段提示字詞重組成一完整句子,並於句尾加上適當標點符號。 ▲請將重組後的句子寫在答案卷之「非選擇題作答區」之指定範圍內,答案中不能增減 字詞或修改變化字詞,請勿抄題。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: The recent terrorist in Australia and Europe raised concerns about national safety all over the world.
questions.explanation: Recent / improves / regular exercise / memory and thinking skills / suggest that / studies 【詳解】 Recent studies suggest that regular exercise improves memory and thinking skills. 選擇建功‧ 14 ‧尊榮一生

questions.q: 本試卷之 第一部份 「 選擇題 」 共 40 題,每題 2 分,共 80 分 。 第一部 份 均為單一選擇題,每題都有
options: 四個選項,請選一 個最適當答案,在答案卡 ( 卷 ) 同一題號對應方格內,用 2B 鉛筆塗滿方 格,但不超出格外。 ˉ

options: Not that I would help you.
What color do you prefer? ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jeremy: Did you watch the NBA games last night? Sophie: No, I am not a basketball fan. Jeremy: Then, Sophie: I am a fan of the baseball games.
options: what sports do you like best?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Rita: Because of the recycled cooking oil problem, Mom cooks dinner for us now. Gary: Yes. Rita: Indeed, we are lucky to eat homemade meals.
options: Most people prefer cooking at home now.
I’m going out for a big dinner. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Adam: I was so worried about today’s exam that I stayed up all night studying. Grace: 公告試題 The last question really confused me, but I think I did a good job. Adam: I guess I can get at least 90 on the exam.
options: Did you sleep well last night?
Do you have a good job?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Kevin: I am learning Japanese. Lynn: That sounds great. Kevin: I plan to go to the 2020 Summer Olympics in Tokyo.
options: Did they offer you a new job in Japan? 僅供參考
Is the Japanese Language Test coming soon?
Do you enjoy Japanese cosplay? ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Operator: Hello. This is Fashion Magazine. How may I help you? Nick: Good morning. It’s Nick, the designer of the XYZ Company. Operator: Just a moment. I’ll put you through.
options: May I speak to the manager?
Can you hold for a minute?
Could I leave a message? ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Charlotte: How was Hannah and Jay’s wedding reception? Damien: It was just beautiful! Charlotte: I wish I could, but I had to take care of my dad in the hospital.
options: Everyone was waiting for the newlyweds.
Too bad you couldn’t come. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Ruby: Richard, I haven’t seen you for a month. You look slimmer. Richard: Thanks! You look good too. Ruby: How did you lose weight? Richard: Ruby: I want to try that too.
options: I have been working out in the gym.
Being on a diet makes me hungry.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Kelly: At what time does the guided tour of the museum start? Tour guide: The last one ended ten minutes ago. Kelly: Thank you! I’ll wait for the next tour at the lobby.
options: The time on my watch is ten to ten.
The next tour will start at ten.
The tour allows only ten people.
The tour lasts for ten minutes. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Ivy: I don’t think I will be able to get a ticket to Jody Jiang’s ( Jiang, Hui ) Farewell Concerts. Sam: Maybe you can try e-booking. Ivy: Well, I don’t think that will help much.
options: Jody Jiang is always my favorite singer.

But it’s still worth trying. 公告試題 ˉ III. 綜合測驗:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 21 至 30 題, 請依各篇 短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 閱讀下文 後,作 答第 21 – 25 題 At a certain point of your life, you c ome to understand most people are neither for you nor against you; they are thinking about themselves. No matter 21 hard you try to please, 僅供參考 some people are not going to love you. The things you learn in 22 aren’t simple things such as acqu iring informati on and skills. You learn not to 23 energy in anxiety, and you learn that self - pity and resentment are the most dangerous emotions. You discover how to 24 your stress. You find that the world admires talent but ignores charact er. Eventually, you need to build up the meaning of your life out of your own past, out of your affections and faiths, and out of humankind’s experience that 25 you. You are the only one who can put the meaning together into a unique pattern, whi ch defines who you are. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the passage mainly about?
options: The history and the meaning of money.
The more money, the less happiness.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What were the first things used by the Chinese as money?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which one of the following statements is true?
options: Only those people who have all the things will die happy.
Without money we can live more happily.
People from Denmark cut off people’s noses to avoid paying taxes.
Paper money was first used by the Chinese people. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What does the word “ bartered ” mean in line 2 in the first paragraph?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the second paragraph of the passage, what does the author think about money?
options: The more money you have, the lonelier you will be.
We all need money to live, but it has little to do with real happiness.
Only those who have spent their life to become rich know the meaning of real happiness.

Over the years, money has made rich people wish to live alone. 公告試題 ˉ ▲ 閱讀下文 後,作 答第 36 – 40 題 As E - commerce has become a global economic trend, people are buying more products than ever before through the Internet. According to the statistics of AC Nielsen Corporation, f ifty - three percent of Taiwanese have bought something electronically, which makes Taiwan the second largest place worldwide in terms of the number of online shoppers. Store owners are worried that the growing amount of online sales will hurt their business es. This has led 僅供參考 traditional stores to seek new ways to keep their customers loyal. Experts say that traditional stores can keep their customers by selling goods that buyers may want to see and taste, or feel the material and try on before purchasing. The stores can also offer services to instantly set up or repair electronic products. In addition, stores can offer things that are difficult to ship, or provide goods to buyers more quickly than online stores. Experts say that traditional stores offer the unique social experiences and personal interactions that most people enjoy. A lot of emotions can occur in the final buying decision. Oftentimes, you need that last sense of “Wow, this is exactly what I want!” before you’re ready to pay, and you can’t always get that online. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Why do traditional stores seek new ways to keep their customers?
options: They don’t know how to shop electronically.
They want to be part of the E-commerce trend.
They are worried about the growing amount of online sales.
The market researchers tell them to do so. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the first paragraph, which of the following is NOT true?
options: Nowadays, people are buying more products through the Internet.
Taiwan has the second largest number of online shoppers in the world.
E-commerce is gradually replacing traditional stores.
E-commerce produces fifty-three percent of global earnings. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the advantage of traditional stores?
options: Buyers can feel the material and try on before purchasing.
Buyers receive shipments more quickly than online shopping.
Buyers can choose any time to get on the Web and shop.
Buyers can compare prices from different online vendors. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Compared with online shopping, traditional stores can offer
options: more variety of goods to choose from.
shopping at any time of the day or night. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What can be inferred from the conclusion?
options: Consumers make their final buying decision based on economic trends.
With traditional shopping, customers are more emotionally involved in making the final buying decision.
Saving money is the first priority when buyers make the final decision.

Since people enjoy the unique social experiences offered by traditional stores, traditional shopping will dominate the future market. 公告試題 ˉ 第二部分:非 選 擇 題 ( 20 分 ) I. 填充 ( 第 1 及第 2 題, 每題 8 分,共 1 6 分 ) 說明: ▲ 請 依 據 中 文 提 示, 在 空 格 內 填 入 適 當 英 文 字 以 完 成 句 子 。 ▲ 僅供參考 每 格 限 填 一 字, 超 過 一 字 者 視 為 錯 誤, 不 予 計 分 。 ▲ 請將答案 ( 空格中單字 ) 依序寫在答案卷之 「 非選擇題作答區 」 之 指 定 範 圍 內, 請勿抄 題。
